rules.description: Combined: Right Command Custom Layer + Left Option Navigation & Scripts + Right Option as Control

to.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "answer really briefly and in a really easy to understand way"'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "in short, what does the following mean? "'

rules.description: Left Option + J/K/L/; to arrow keys, Left Option + Left Shift + J/K/L/; for shift+arrow keys, Left Option + Left Command + J/K/L/; for command+arrow keys, Left Option + 1/2 for tab switching

to.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "answer really briefly and in a really easy to understand way"'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "in short, what does the following mean? "'
